Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 151 

The CCW_APR_LINK_KEY identifies each unique combination of submitting state entity code 
(SUBMTG_STATE_CD) and state-specific provider identifier (SUBMTG_STATE_PRVDR_ID). ^ TOC ^
